description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in a modern, urban style with a long, belted trench coat layered over a hooded sweatshirt. The individual wears a wide-brimmed bucket hat and a face mask, giving a sense of anonymity and protection. Their hands are gloved, and the pants are tucked into sturdy, lace-up combat boots, suggesting readiness for various weather conditions. The back of the coat features a large, colorful patch or graphic, adding a unique and expressive touch to the otherwise dark attire. The overall silhouette is robust and slightly bulky, with visible metallic details on the coat's sleeves and belt. The figure stands upright, exuding a sense of alertness and purpose, suitable for navigating busy city environments.
description: A standing adult in urban attire, featuring a long trench coat, hooded sweatshirt, bucket hat, gloves, and combat boots, with a distinctive graphic on the back of the coat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bucket hat, face mask, hooded sweatshirt, belted trench coat, gloves, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, coat, and boots, with the hood visible under the coat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large, colorful patch or graphic on the back of the coat and the full length of the coat and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hat, coat, and boots, with gloved hands visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat over a hooded sweatshirt, gloves, and bucket hat with combat boots
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by hat and hood
